query: UPDATE users SET role = 'admin' WHERE openId = (SELECT OWNER_OPEN_ID FROM ENV LIMIT 1) OR email LIKE '%@%' AND name LIKE '%Ahmed%' LIMIT 1; SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
